message:
fix: skip tip fade entirely when user prefers reduced motion (#5914)

The CSS @media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) block disabled the
opacity transition, but showTip() still set opacity=0 for 400ms,
making the tip flash blank. Now skip the fade timeout entirely when
the user prefers reduced motion.

Fixes #5910

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
